gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/288)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/288)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْفُقَّاعِ فَقَالَ هُوَ خَمْرٌ مَجْهُولٌ فَلَا تَشْرَبْهُ يَا سُلَيْمَانُ لَوْ كَانَ الدَّارُ لِي أَوِ الْحُكْمُ لَقَتَلْتُ بَائِعَهُ وَ لَجَلَدْتُ شَارِبَهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin ZIiyad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far Al Ja’fary who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the fermented drink, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is an unknown wine, therefore do not drink it, O Suleyman! If the house was mine<sup>asws</sup> or the rule, I<sup>asws</sup> would kill its seller and whip its drinker’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Sulayman ibn Ja‘far al-Ja‘fariy who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Fuqa‘ (beer). He (the Imam) said, ‘It is unknown wine. Do not drink it, O Sulayman. If the house and command were in my hand I would execute its seller and whip its drinker.’”
